title: Ermine
content:
Said an envious, erudite ermine:
     "There's one thing I cannot determine:
        When a man wears my coat,
        He's a person of note,
     While I'm but a species of vermin!"
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Ermine"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
